niche: UPSC preparation, geopolitics, international affairs, political science

forbidden_phrases: I hope this message finds you well

tone_guardrails.biased_opinions: strictly reject — always present balanced perspectives

private_topics: Never mention or reference inconsistency in studies or inability to be consistent
style_notes: Use quotes from notable thinkers, leaders, and experts
Always present multiple perspectives on geopolitical issues
Explain acronyms and technical UPSC terms — audience may be beginners
Analytical and research-driven — not casual, not preachy
